wifi1.message:
Make sure your router is powered on and Jibo is in range.
Go to the app for help and to get a new QR code.
wifi1.instructions: Tap here to connect with your new code.

wifix.message:
Jibo didn't connect to Wi-Fi.
Try rebooting him, or go to the app for help.
wifix.instructions: To change Wi-Fi settings, get a new QR code and tap here.

ota1.message:
Make sure your router is powered on and Jibo is in range.
Go to the app for more help.
ota1.instructions: To reconnect, get a new QR code in the app and tap here.
